title: Robotics & AI Journey
overview: Build, Design, Simulate, and Apply Robotics in the Real World

modules.name: Introduction to Robotics & AI
content: Overview of the course, setup instructions, and expectations.
Why, how , -> building 1 billion dynamiclands.

modules.name: Foundations of Hardware Design & Repair  & Maintenance Essentials
content: Introduction to kinematics and dynamics
Mechanism design: Gears, pulleys, and linkages for smooth motion
Overview of essential robotics tools (Dynamixels, CNC machining, 3D printing)

modules.name: Electrical Engineering Essentials for Robotics
content: Power management and motor drivers
Introduction to embedded systems: Arduino, STM32, Jetson
Communication protocols: UART, SPI, I2C

modules.name: Perception and Machine Learning for Robotics
content: Introduction to Segment Anything and YOLO object detection
Camera calibration and 3D annotation using Stable Diffusion
Using vision transformers for real-world problem-solving

modules.name: Planning & Prediction for Robotics Systems
content: Mathematical attention mechanisms for planning
Human motion trajectory prediction
LLMs vs Classical Planning: Neural ODEs and DSPs

modules.name: Simulation for Robotics Applications
content: Setting up Unreal Engine and Isaac ROS for simulations
Randomization for Sim2Real generalization
Evaluating manipulation policies in simulators

modules.name: User Interfaces and Command Systems
content: Tele-guidance and remote control of robots
Building a command and control interface
Interactive debugging using authority chips

modules.name: Real World Applications of Robotics
content: Robotics for agriculture, logistics, and medical fields
House building, gardening, and service robots
Aqua robotics and feeding stray animals

modules.name: Robotics Repair
content: Fault diagnosis and troubleshooting
Motor and actuator repair and sensor calibration
Preventative maintenance and structural repairs

modules.name: Building Robotics UI with React & Three.js
content: Integrating Three.js into robotic UIs
Handling events with mouse and raycasters
Post-processing effects for robotics dashboards

modules.name: Real-World Robotics Application
content: Combine all skills into a final robotics project
Test Sim2Real transfer and evaluate with live data
Presentation and feedback session
Feeding stray cats using robots
house building
robot gardening
Space Exploration
